title: About the Research and Development Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Research and Development Survey
23 July 2024, 10:45am
Information about taking part in the Research and Development (R&D) Survey, such as why we carry out the survey, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
The 2025 Research and Development Survey is currently being collected. If your business has been chosen, please download, complete, and return your form.
Research and Development Survey 2025 forms
We carry out this survey to collect data that will be used to:
- produce summarised statistics of R&D activities for government, business, and other users in the community
- develop science policy in areas such as the setting of research priorities, government research funding levels, science education, and innovation encouragement schemes.
This is a joint survey with the Ministry of Business, Innovation & Employment.
We survey businesses in New Zealand who are likely to be performing or funding research and development activities.
We select approximately 5,000 of the total 6,000 of these businesses to participate in the survey. You may be selected if:
- your business is performing or funding research and development activities
- your business has performed or funded research and development activities in the past
- your business is engaged (directly or indirectly) in research and development activities.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Research and Development Survey.
The survey is usually carried out every two (even) years, and is sent to the business, government, higher education, and Crown Research Institute sectors.
However, since 2019, there have been additional iterations (odd years) of the survey in which only the business sector was part of the survey.  Government and Crown Research Institute sectors are not included in these odd years.

## How to complete the survey
You fill in an editable PDF questionnaire.
Download Research and Development Survey 2025 forms
Because this is a joint survey, your information may be shared with the Ministry of Business, Innovation & Employment. Page 15 of the questionnaire provides more detail about this.
More information about joint surveys

### What if my business is not currently engaged in R&D?
Even if your business did not fund any R&D in the last financial year, we still need a response from you. Answering 'no' to the indicator questions actually helps us to improve the quality of future R&D survey populations.

### What Research and Development activity should I include?
This survey is based on a broad definition of R&D, which is outlined in full on page 14 of the questionnaire. You may have seen R&D defined differently elsewhere. For example, Inland Revenue’s new R&D tax incentive uses a different, narrower definition than the one used for this survey. It is important that you base your answers on the definition given in the questionnaire.
